headline: KeyBanc Flags Verizon’s (VZ) New Reporting Structure as Investor-Unfriendly
summary: Verizon Communications Inc. (NYSE:VZ) is included among the 14 Quality Stocks with Highest Dividends. On March 16, KeyBanc commented on Verizon Communications Inc. (NYSE:VZ)’s planned changes to its reporting structure, which will begin in Q1. The firm said the updated disclosures are practically useless for modeling purposes. It pointed to a lack of transparency and […]
